settings.poll_interval.label: Poll interval (seconds)
settings.poll_interval.description: How often the Tailscale status is refreshed.
settings.hide_mullvad.label: Hide Mullvad exit nodes
settings.hide_mullvad.description: Hide Mullvad VPN exit nodes from the peer list.
settings.hide_offline.label: Hide offline peers
settings.hide_offline.description: Hide offline peers from the panel and launcher lists.
settings.show_ip.label: Show own IP
settings.show_ip.description: Show this node's Tailscale IP in the bar.
settings.show_count.label: Show peer count
settings.show_count.description: Show online/total peers next to the icon.
panel.title: Tailscale
panel.needs-login: Tailscale needs authentication. Open the login page in the browser.
toast.title: Tailscale
shortcut.label: Tailscale
settings.taildrop_dir.label: Taildrop download folder
settings.taildrop_dir.description: Where received files are saved. Empty = the XDG download folder.
settings.ssh_username.label: SSH username
settings.ssh_username.description: Username for the SSH button. Empty = system default.
